snippet: For mailbox status/questions in BOKU context, use exec with Himalaya wrapper first instead of assumptions. Wrapper path: skills/himalaya-boku-lll/scripts/himalaya-boku-lll-wrapper.ps1. IMPORTANT syntax: put options BEFORE search query. Correct: '& $wrapper envelope list -s 50 "from wordpress@usage-ng.boku.ac.at"'. Also valid: '& $wrapper envelope list -s 20'. Do not use query before '-s'. IMPORTANT move/copy order: target first, then ID(s): '& $wrapper message move "Trash" 255' (NOT '255 Trash'). BOKU GroupWise rule (imap.boku.ac.at, all BOKU mailboxes): do NOT use message move/delete for cleanup; prefer '& $wrapper message copy "Trash" <ID>' and then verify. If tool output contains 'Error:' or 'cannot parse', do not claim success: correct the command and retry once.
